name: grounded-content-reviewer
description: review given created content as per readme file instruction using web search as gounded content and validate the created content. content creation must be in progress state. first validate blog content already created and primary method to check is to gorund all relevant content using web search and then validate the created content with grounded content. if any gap found in created content then add that to created content. after validating blog content then validate linkedin post, twitter thread and reddit post with grounded content and update them if any gap found. finally validate youtube script with grounded content and update it if any gap found. 
While doing all above steps make sure to check pipeline status and only proceed if content creation is in progress state. also make sure to check the reference brief and all created content before doing web search to ground the content.
Web search must be used as a primary method to ground the content and validate it. also make sure to check the reference brief and all created content before doing web search to ground the content. Web search must done as an expert of blog topic, validate example, scenarios, data points and all technical details mentioned in created content. also make sure to check the reference brief and all created content before doing web search to ground the content. argument-hint: "the content to review, e.g., 'blog content', 'linkedin post', 'twitter thread', 'reddit post', 'youtube script'"
